# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Direct URL to the build artifact (S3 presigned URL, Artifactory URL, HTTP/HTTPS URL, etc.)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: 'artifact.zip', description: 'Local filename to use for the downloaded artifact')
        choice(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET', choices: ['prod', 'staging'], description: 'Deployment target')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS', defaultValue: 'prod1.example.com,prod2.example.com', description: 'Comma-separated list of target servers')
        string(name: 'REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases', description: 'Remote directory where artifacts will be deployed')
        booleanParam(name: 'EXTRACT_ZIP', defaultValue: true, description: 'Extract artifact if it is a zip file')
        booleanParam(name: 'CLEAN_REMOTE_DIR', defaultValue: false, description: 'Clean remote deploy directory before copying')
    }

    environment {
        SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID = 'prod-ssh-key'
        SSH_USER = 'deploy'
        WORK_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact-work"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error('DEPLOY_SERVERS is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR?.trim()) {
                        error('REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR is required')
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh """
                    set -e
                    rm -rf '${WORK_DIR}'
                    mkdir -p '${WORK_DIR}'
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                dir("${WORK_DIR}") {
                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        echo "Downloading artifact from: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 0 -o '${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}' '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}'
                        ls -lh '${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Inspect Artifact') {
            steps {
                dir("${WORK_DIR}") {
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        file '${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}' || true
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    if (servers.isEmpty()) {
                        error('No valid servers found in DEPLOY_SERVERS')
                    }

                    sshagent(credentials: [env.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            echo "Deploying to ${server}"
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail

                                SERVER='${server}'
                                REMOTE_DIR='${params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR}'
                                LOCAL_FILE='${WORK_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}'

                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${env.SSH_USER}@${SERVER} 'mkdir -p "${REMOTE_DIR}"'

                                if [ '${params.CLEAN_REMOTE_DIR}' = 'true' ]; then
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${env.SSH_USER}@${SERVER} 'rm -rf "${REMOTE_DIR:?}"/*'
                                fi

                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "${LOCAL_FILE}" ${env.SSH_USER}@${SERVER}:"${REMOTE_DIR}/"

                                if [ '${params.EXTRACT_ZIP}' = 'true' ]; then
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${env.SSH_USER}@${SERVER} '
                                        set -e
                                        cd "'"${REMOTE_DIR}"'"
                                        case "'"${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"'" in
                                            *.zip)
                                                unzip -o "'"${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"'"
                                                ;;
                                            *)
                                                echo "Skipping extraction: not a zip artifact"
                                                ;;
                                        esac
                                    '
                                fi
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    sshagent(credentials: [env.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${env.SSH_USER}@${server} 'ls -lah "${params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR}"'
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            sh """
                set +e
                rm -rf '${WORK_DIR}'
            """
        }
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed'
        }
    }
}
